events.description: Before tool execution
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON of tool call arguments.
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - stdout/stderr not shown
Exit code 2 - show stderr to model and block tool call
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only but continue with tool call
events.raw:
PreToolUse - Matchers
  Input to command is JSON of tool call arguments.
  Exit code 0 - stdout/stderr not shown
  Exit code 2 - show stderr to model and block tool call
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only but continue with tool call

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: After tool execution
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with fields "inputs" (tool call arguments) and "response" (tool call response).
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - stdout shown in transcript mode (ctrl+o)
Exit code 2 - show stderr to model immediately
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
PostToolUse - Matchers
  Input to command is JSON with fields "inputs" (tool call arguments) and
  "response" (tool call response).
  Exit code 0 - stdout shown in transcript mode (ctrl+o)
  Exit code 2 - show stderr to model immediately
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: After tool execution fails
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with tool_name, tool_input, tool_use_id, error, error_type, is_interrupt, and is_timeout.
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - stdout shown in transcript mode (ctrl+o)
Exit code 2 - show stderr to model immediately
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
PostToolUseFailure - Matchers
  Input to command is JSON with tool_name, tool_input, tool_use_id, error,
  error_type, is_interrupt, and is_timeout.
  Exit code 0 - stdout shown in transcript mode (ctrl+o)
  Exit code 2 - show stderr to model immediately
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: After a batch of tool calls resolves
events.output_note: Return additionalContext via hookSpecificOutput to inject context once for the whole batch.
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 2 - stop the agentic loop (stderr shown to user only)
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
PostToolBatch
  Fires once after every tool call in a batch has resolved, before the next
  model request. Input includes tool_calls (array of {tool_name, tool_input,
  tool_use_id, tool_response}).
  Return additionalContext via hookSpecificOutput to inject context once for
  the whole batch.
  Exit code 2 - stop the agentic loop (stderr shown to user only)
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: After auto mode classifier denies a tool call
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with tool_name, tool_input, tool_use_id, and reason.
events.output_note: Return {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PermissionDenied","retry":true}} to tell the model it may retry.
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - stdout shown in transcript mode (ctrl+o)
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
PermissionDenied - Matchers
  Input to command is JSON with tool_name, tool_input, tool_use_id, and
  reason.
  Return
  {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PermissionDenied","retry":true}} to
  tell the model it may retry.
  Exit code 0 - stdout shown in transcript mode (ctrl+o)
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: When notifications are sent

Notification - Matchers

events.description: Right before Claude concludes its response
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - stdout/stderr not shown
Exit code 2 - show stderr to model and continue conversation
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
Stop
  Exit code 0 - stdout/stderr not shown
  Exit code 2 - show stderr to model and continue conversation

events.description: When the turn ends due to an API error
events.raw:
StopFailure - Matchers
  Fires instead of Stop when an API error (rate limit, auth failure, etc.)
  ended the turn. Fire-and-forget — hook output and exit codes are ignored.

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

Exit code 0 - use hook decision if provided

PermissionRequest - Matchers

events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with teammate_name and team_name.

Exit code 0 - stdout/stderr not shown
Exit code 2 - show stderr to teammate and prevent idle (teammate continues
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

TeammateIdle

Exit code 0 - stdout/stderr not shown
Exit code 2 - show stderr to model and prevent task creation

TaskCreated

events.description: When an MCP server requests user input
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with mcp_server_name, message, and requested_schema.
events.output_note: Output JSON with hookSpecificOutput containing action (accept/decline/cancel) and optional content.
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - use hook response if provided
Exit code 2 - deny the elicitation
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
Elicitation - Matchers
  Input to command is JSON with mcp_server_name, message, and
  requested_schema.
  Output JSON with hookSpecificOutput containing action
  (accept/decline/cancel) and optional content.
  Exit code 0 - use hook response if provided
  Exit code 2 - deny the elicitation
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: After a user responds to an MCP elicitation
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with mcp_server_name, action, content, mode, and elicitation_id.
events.output_note: Output JSON with hookSpecificOutput containing optional action and content to override the response.
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - use hook response if provided
Exit code 2 - block the response (action becomes decline)
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
ElicitationResult - Matchers
  Input to command is JSON with mcp_server_name, action, content, mode, and
  elicitation_id.
  Output JSON with hookSpecificOutput containing optional action and content
  to override the response.
  Exit code 0 - use hook response if provided
  Exit code 2 - block the response (action becomes decline)
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: When configuration files change during a session
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with source (user_settings, project_settings, local_settings, policy_settings, skills) and file_path.
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - allow the change
Exit code 2 - block the change from being applied to the session
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
ConfigChange - Matchers
  Input to command is JSON with source (user_settings, project_settings,
  local_settings, policy_settings, skills) and file_path.
  Exit code 0 - allow the change
  Exit code 2 - block the change from being applied to the session
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: When an instruction file (CLAUDE.md or rule) is
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with file_path, memory_type (User, Project, Local, Managed), load_reason (session_start, nested_traversal, path_glob_match, include, compact), globs (optional — the paths: frontmatter patterns that matched), trigger_file_path (optional — the file Claude touched that caused the load), and parent_file_path (optional — the file that @-included this one).
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - command completes successfully
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
InstructionsLoaded - Matchers
  Input to command is JSON with file_path, memory_type (User, Project, Local,
  Managed), load_reason (session_start, nested_traversal, path_glob_match,
  include, compact), globs (optional — the paths: frontmatter patterns that
  matched), trigger_file_path (optional — the file Claude touched that caused
  the load), and parent_file_path (optional — the file that @-included this
  one).
  Exit code 0 - command completes successfully
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
  This hook is observability-only and does not support blocking.

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: Create an isolated worktree for VCS-agnostic
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with name (suggested worktree slug). Stdout should contain the absolute path to the created worktree directory.
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - worktree created successfully
Other exit codes - worktree creation failed
events.raw:
WorktreeCreate
  Input to command is JSON with name (suggested worktree slug).
  Stdout should contain the absolute path to the created worktree directory.
  Exit code 0 - worktree created successfully
  Other exit codes - worktree creation failed

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: Remove a previously created worktree
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with worktree_path (absolute path to worktree).
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - worktree removed successfully
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
WorktreeRemove
  Input to command is JSON with worktree_path (absolute path to worktree).
  Exit code 0 - worktree removed successfully
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: After the working directory changes
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with old_cwd and new_cwd. CLAUDE_ENV_FILE is set — write bash exports there to apply env to subsequent BashTool commands.
events.output_note: Hook output can include hookSpecificOutput.watchPaths (array of absolute paths) to register with the FileChanged watcher.
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - command completes successfully
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
CwdChanged
  Input to command is JSON with old_cwd and new_cwd.
  CLAUDE_ENV_FILE is set — write bash exports there to apply env to subsequent
  BashTool commands.
  Hook output can include hookSpecificOutput.watchPaths (array of absolute
  paths) to register with the FileChanged watcher.
  Exit code 0 - command completes successfully
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: When a watched file changes
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with file_path and event (change, add, unlink). CLAUDE_ENV_FILE is set — write bash exports there to apply env to subsequent BashTool commands. The matcher field specifies filenames to watch in the current directory (e.g. ".envrc|.env").
events.output_note: Hook output can include hookSpecificOutput.watchPaths (array of absolute paths) to dynamically update the watch list.
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - command completes successfully
Other exit codes - show stderr to user only
events.raw:
FileChanged
  Input to command is JSON with file_path and event (change, add, unlink).
  CLAUDE_ENV_FILE is set — write bash exports there to apply env to subsequent
  BashTool commands.
  The matcher field specifies filenames to watch in the current directory
  (e.g. ".envrc|.env").
  Hook output can include hookSpecificOutput.watchPaths (array of absolute
  paths) to dynamically update the watch list.
  Exit code 0 - command completes successfully
  Other exit codes - show stderr to user only

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude

events.description: While assistant message text is displayed
events.input_note: Input to command is JSON with turn_id, message_id, index, final, and delta (the newly completed lines).
events.output_note: Output JSON with hookSpecificOutput containing displayContent to replace the delta on screen. Display-only: the stored message and what the model sees are untouched.
events.exit_codes:
Exit code 0 - use hook response if provided
Other exit codes - display the original delta
events.raw:
MessageDisplay
  Input to command is JSON with turn_id, message_id, index, final, and delta
  (the newly completed lines).
  Output JSON with hookSpecificOutput containing displayContent to replace the
  delta on screen.
  Display-only: the stored message and what the model sees are untouched.
  Exit code 0 - use hook response if provided
  Other exit codes - display the original delta

  No hooks configured for this event
  To add hooks, edit settings.json directly or ask Claude
